catalog_content:
Item Name: Jasmine Oolong Tea Artisan Quality - Whole Leaf Rolled With Real Jasmine
Bullet Point 1: Our Jasmine Oolong tea is definitely one for any tea lover to savour. It doesn’t matter if you’re a connoisseur or experimenting with new teas, this is one to try.
Bullet Point 2: This Jasmine Oolong is made by combining delicious oolong tea with specially chosen Jasmine flowers. When steeped and brewed, this creates a sweet, fragrant tea that rewards your careful attention.
Bullet Point 3: While Oolong teas might seem daunting to those who are used to black or green teas, we select the finest, tastiest Oolongs to ensure you’ll have an amazing tea drinking experience.
Bullet Point 4: By adding jasmine flowers to the rolled leaves, this loose leaf tea is given an extra depth of flavour that you’ll find calming and relaxing.
Bullet Point 5: We strongly believe that the higher quality a product, the more benefits it brings - because it's loaded with the right substances. That's why we search around the world for the finest produce.
